summary: All acceptance criteria verified as met. market_stream.py, state_hub.py, dashboard_server.py, and dashboard.html are fully implemented and verified end-to-end by VERIFY_REALTIME_MARKET_STREAM_STAGE1_FINAL (APPROVED). Live Polymarket WebSocket marks flow through state_hub to SSE /api/stream/state. Each position in the payload carries best_bid, best_ask, spread, source_ts, mark_source=polymarket_stream, unrealized_pnl_usd, live_equity_usd. Stale/fresh state is explicit. REST fallback remains intact and rollback path is available.
